c74object.name: tap.sustain~
c74object.digest: Snap a time to the nearest zero-crossing location in a buffer
c74object.description: Snap a time to the nearest zero-crossing location in a buffer.

method.name: bang
method.description: Sustain pedal pressed. 127 = fully pressed, 0 = released, 64 = half-pressed.

attribute.name: fade
attribute.digest: Length of crossfade across loop-points in milliseconds
attribute.description: Length of crossfade across loop-points in milliseconds.

attribute.name: length
attribute.digest: Maximum length of the captured loop in milliseconds
attribute.description: Maximum length of the captured loop in milliseconds.
